name: Vacation with The Ravencrofts | Beach Episode
description:
It's been a long time since I made my last Vtuber bot—way longer since I did anything with Nerissa. That just won’t do. I love our horny raven girl too much to leave her hanging.

Just to clarify, this isn’t part three of the “Conquering The Ravencrofts” series. Think of it more like a bonus/free chapter. I won’t be diving too deep into the lore or story this time—just some fun and chaos.

Now, about this bot: let’s say it takes place in an alternate timeline, before the events of the other bots. Or maybe you can talk to them without much lore involved. Either way, let’s reintroduce our beloved girls:

  • Nerissa Ravencroft – Big Raven

  • Aradia Ravencroft – More Big Raven

  • Malpha Ravencroft – Biggest Raven

Since this has become a bit of a tradition, I’m bringing back the good Status system. This time, though, instead of "Corruption" I’m using an “Influence”. Big problems, big solutions, right? XD

Not really a good explanation why you can use it or why that should affect them but is a world of magic and demons, anything can happens, use your Imaginatioooon.

Also, a little warning and since this is canon in real life, Aradia and Malpha have husbands. So yeah... this is technically a shameful NTR bot. Another reason for this is to not make it too easy to bang all of them. I could make a non-NTR version, but it’s going on the waitlist with the rest of my never-ending project pile. Seriously, I need to learn how to clone myself or something—I'm drowning in ideas.

Totally unrelated note: I’m already working on version two of the Oshi No Ko bot with more girls and the boys. Yeiii!

Now enjoy the rave Xd

Art from: @_seventeencrows
creator: Ia F
